title: Zorro's Black Whip
writer: Basil Dickey, Jesse Duffy, Grant Nelson
actors: George J. Lewis, Linda Stirling, Lucien Littlefield
plot: Hammond, a leading citizen who owns the town's stagecoach line, is opposed to Idaho becoming a state, and kills Randolph Meredith, owner of the town's newspaper, for endorsing it. Meredith's sister Barbara, expert with a bullwhip ...
